code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn find_idx(_ buf: String, _ tok: String) -> Int
  let blen = string.len(buf)
  mut start = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < blen
    let b = byte_of(buf, i)
    if b == 10
      let piece = string.substring(buf, start, i)
      if piece == tok
        return idx
      end
      start = i + 1
      idx = idx + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  -1
end

fn get_token(_ buf: String, _ idx: Int) -> String
  let blen = string.len(buf)
  mut start = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < blen
    let b = byte_of(buf, i)
    if b == 10
      if cur == idx
        return string.substring(buf, start, i)
      end
      start = i + 1
      cur = cur + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  ""
end

fn increment_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = counts.len()
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < n
    let v = match counts.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == idx
      out = list.push(out, v + 1)
    else
      out = list.push(out, v)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut buf = ""
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  mut ntok = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_of(input, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(byte_of(input, i))
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      let idx = find_idx(buf, tok)
      if idx < 0
        buf = "#{buf}#{tok}\n"
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
        ntok = ntok + 1
      else
        counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
      end
    end
  end

  mut best_idx = -1
  mut best_count = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < ntok
    let v = match counts.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if best_idx < 0 or v > best_count
      best_idx = j
      best_count = v
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  if best_idx < 0
    println("top==0")
  else
    let tok = get_token(buf, best_idx)
    println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
  end
end
